Landing.heroSub: The ultimate platform to level up your Web3 development skills. Earn XP, climb the global leaderboard, and prove your knowledge on-chain.
Landing.feat1Desc: Write, test, and deploy Solana programs directly in your browser.
Landing.feat2Desc: Your progress is secured and verified using Ed25519 signatures.
Landing.feat3Desc: Compete with developers worldwide and showcase your true rank.
